comments.body:
Dear [~N204554] - san ,
cc [~LGEJ-LGEJ707] , [~LGEJ-LGEJ242] 
Could you please provide us the Document F-N01-01_Sonar_V3.2.5 on this epic. Currently we couldn't find V3.2.5 on codebeamer.
!image-2026-03-18-13-33-39-432.png|width=696,height=366!
Thank you & BRs!

Hello [~LGEJ-LGEJ217] -san,
Please check the attached file. (F-N01-01_Sonar_V3.2.5.doc)
It is also stored in SharePoint at the following link.

[11_VisionSystem_Camera_Sonar|https://nissangroup.sharepoint.com/:f:/r/teams/JAO_NML_06_047776_CDC_CCS2_Evo_Spec/Shared%20Documents/01_Specification/01_Functional%20Specifications/27_ST1.27/11_VisionSystem_Camera_Sonar?csf=1&web=1&e=wjrRAS]
